summary: \boxed{\text{Golgi bodies sort proteins, particularly important ones such as glycoproteins, which can include enzymes, receptors, and signaling molecules that need precise localization within or outside the cell}}. This summary captures both the core functional point regarding sorting and highlights an example application involving significant biological roles fulfilled by these organelles based on common knowledge related to them without referencing non-relevant details from other processes not explicitly linked back to Golgi body operations per se but still essential background info when considering overall utility/functions attributed thereto across diverse contexts pertinent herein.
